npm.reachability: The web application deliberately renders registry icons with a plain HTML img element and does not import next/image or expose an image-optimizer route, so untrusted image bytes do not reach sharp in the supported application routes.
npm.remediationCondition: Upgrade to the first stable Next.js release whose optional dependency permits sharp 0.35.0 or newer, or remove the exception after a separately reviewed and fully tested compatible override.
